nodes.label: Hero Slideshow Image 4 - Digital Leadership Dialogue 1.2 Panel
nodes.description: Panel discussion on a red-carpeted stage at the Digital Leadership Dialogue 1.2 event. The backdrop banner reads 'Digital Leadership Dialogue 1.2 - Manifesto to Action: Ensuring Execution of Digital Commitments - Accountability, Budgeting, Governance & Measurable Impact.' Organized as a joint initiative of IFN and Tech Nepal. Ummedwar Mela branding also visible. Several panelists are seated in a row.
